FOOTER.DESCRIPTION: InnoTech University is committed to providing world-class education and fostering innovation. Join our community of learners and leaders shaping the future.

CONTACT.HERO_SUBTITLE: We're here to help you with any questions about our programs, admissions, or university life.
CONTACT.ADDRESS: 123 University Avenue, Tech City, TC 12345, France
CONTACT.MAP_DESCRIPTION: Located in a convenient spot right on the street, easily accessible for everyone.
CONTACT.SOCIAL_DESCRIPTION: Follow us for the latest updates and news.
CONTACT.CHAT_DESCRIPTION: Get instant answers to your questions.
CONTACT.FAQ_DESCRIPTION: Find answers to frequently asked questions.
CONTACT.SOCIAL_SUBTITLE: Follow us on social media and stay updated with the latest news, events, and opportunities at InnoTech University.
CONTACT.NEWSLETTER_DESCRIPTION: Subscribe to our newsletter and never miss important updates about programs, events, and opportunities.
CONTACT.RESPONSE_TIME_DESC: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days.
CONTACT.TIP_1_DESC: Include specific details about your inquiry for faster assistance.
CONTACT.TIP_2_DESC: Make sure to check your spam folder for our response.
CONTACT.TIP_3_DESC: Mention specific dates, names, or departments if relevant to your inquiry.
CONTACT.TIP_4_DESC: For urgent matters, please call us directly during office hours.
CONTACT.EMERGENCY_DESC: For urgent matters outside office hours, use our emergency line.

HERO.SUBTITLE: Education is the best key to success in life

ABOUT.TITLE: We are university since 2 years
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: InnoTech University has been a beacon of excellence in higher education for over a decade. We are committed to providing world-class education that prepares our students for the challenges of tomorrow. Our state-of-the-art facilities, experienced faculty, and innovative curriculum ensure that our graduates are well-equipped to make meaningful contributions to society.

ANNUAL_SPORTS.TITLE: Annual sports day
ANNUAL_SPORTS.DESCRIPTION: Join us for our annual sports day featuring various competitions, team building activities, and celebration of athletic excellence among our students and faculty.

AI_HACKATHON.TITLE: AI & Machine Learning Hackathon
AI_HACKATHON.DESCRIPTION: Collaborate with peers to build innovative AI solutions in a 48-hour challenge.

IT_CAREER_FAIR.TITLE: IT & Tech Career Fair
IT_CAREER_FAIR.DESCRIPTION: Meet top companies in the tech industry and explore internship and job opportunities.

VIDEO_TOUR.TITLE: University Video Tour
VIDEO_TOUR.COMING_SOON: Video tour feature coming soon! Stay tuned for an immersive virtual experience of our campus.

TESTIMONIALS.TITLE: What Our Students Say
TESTIMONIALS.QUOTE_1: InnoTech transformed my learning journey, blending theory with hands-on projects that prepared me for the real tech world. The mentorship I received here shaped my confidence and skills for my future career.
TESTIMONIALS.QUOTE_2: The modern, interactive teaching methods at InnoTech made complex concepts clear and engaging. I was able to build real applications, collaborate on projects, and connect with industry mentors during my studies.
TESTIMONIALS.QUOTE_3: InnoTech’s programs opened doors for me in the tech industry. With hands-on labs, industry-driven projects, and dedicated instructors, I graduated fully ready to contribute in the data science field.

ABOUT.HERO_DESCRIPTION: Discover our commitment to excellence in technological education, innovation, and preparing students for the challenges of tomorrow's digital world.
ABOUT.HISTORY_DESCRIPTION: Founded in 2025, InnoTech University has rapidly established itself as a reference in technological higher education. Our mission is to train highly qualified professionals, capable of meeting the technological challenges of the future.
ABOUT.VALUES_DESCRIPTION: Our core values guide everything we do, from curriculum design to student support, ensuring we deliver excellence in education.
